name: Lawn Mite

attacks.name: Biting jump
attacks.tell: The mite crouches briefly and then jumps towards the player with its mouth open
attacks.howToAvoid: Quickly move away from the landing point or block right on impact
attacks.notes: Unique mite attack; causes little damage but can come in groups

description: A tiny early-yard creature that makes up for its fragility with irritating leaps and immediate aggression.
behavior: It patrols small areas and breaks off its route as soon as it detects a threat. Even though it is slow on the ground, it covers a lot of distance with a single leap.
interactionWithPlayer: It is immediately hostile and often attacks in groups. The danger is not each individual hit, but how easily several can keep chaining leaps into you.
interactionWithCreatures: It tends to leap at almost anything small that enters its space, but rarely dominates a prolonged fight against larger enemies.
strategy: Any quick weapon is enough if you do not give it room. Stabbing and chopping help a lot, but the real trick is killing it before the group closes around you.
